title: Media Controller
description: The function block Media Control allows for different devices to be controlled via a common interface, similar to a universal remote control

inputs.description: Toggles power between on and off of current mode. Double-click ends the current mode.
Powers off the current mode. Double-click also powers off the current mode.
Powers on the current mode. Double-click powers of the current mode.
Increases volume or starts current mode when power is Off. Double-click executes the command Channel up (Ch+).
Decreases volume of the current mode. Double-click ends off the current mode.
Switches to channel based on it's number.
Activates mode based on it's assigned ID.
Activates mode 1-8. Double-click ends the current mode. Positive Edge on Input always executes 'Change to Mode' actions.
Button 2 : Volume up or starts current mode when power is Off. Double-click executes the command Channel up (Ch+). Button 5 : Volume down; Double-click ends the current mode.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Disables inputs (Ptg), (Poff), (Pon), (V+), (V-), (V), (Ch+), (Ch-), (Mode), (M1-8), (T5), (Off) when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Time after last input before sending the number automatically without further confirmation.

properties.description: Edit modes of the media controller
